comment: Review 2026-07-22: PG, wirklich berühmte Autoren, grundlegende Wahrheiten, Fehlzuschreibungen. Wird von build-quotes.mjs angewendet.
texts: 'As I am, so are these. As are these, so am I.' Drawing the parallel to yourself, neither kill nor get others to kill.
'As I am, so are they; as they are, so am I.' Comparing others with oneself, do not kill nor cause others to kill.
Age does not protect you from love. But love, to some extent, protects you from age.
And as we let our own light shine, we unconsciously give other people permission to do the same.
As we are liberated from our own fear, our presence automatically liberates others.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Better to have loved and lost, than to have never loved at all.
Build a better mousetrap and the world will beat a path to your door.
By failing to prepare, you are preparing to fail.
Can you imagine what I would do if I could do all I can?
Choose a job you love, and you will never have to work a day in your life.
Courage is going from failure to failure without losing enthusiasm.
Criticism is something you can easily avoid by saying nothing, doing nothing, and being nothing.
Do one thing every day that scares you.
Does wisdom perhaps appear on the earth as a raven which is inspired by the smell of carrion?
Don't cry because it's over. Smile because it happened.
Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact. Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.
For it was not into my ear you whispered, but into my heart. It was not my lips you kissed, but my soul.
Give a man a fish and you feed him for a day. Teach him how to fish and you feed him for a lifetime.
Give me six hours to chop down a tree and I will spend the first four sharpening the axe.
Golf is a game in which one endeavors to control a ball with implements ill adapted for the purpose.
Great indeed is the sublimity of the Creative, to which all beings owe their beginning, and which permeates all heaven.
Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are in harmony.
I hear and I forget. I see and I remember. I do and I understand.
I love you the more in that I believe you had liked me for my own sake and for nothing else.
I want you to be everything that's you, deep at the center of your being.
I'm a great believer in luck and I find the harder I work, the more I have of it.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
If you don't know where you are going, any road will get you there.
If you have a harem of 40 women, you never get to know any of them very well.
If you want to succeed you should strike out on new paths, rather than travel the worn paths of accepted success.
If your actions inspire others to dream more, learn more, do more and become more, you are a leader.
In order to win, you must expect to win.
In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
It's just a job. Grass grows, birds fly, waves pound the sand. I beat people up.
Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
Lord, make me an instrument of thy peace. Where there is hatred, let me sow love.
Love doesn't make the world go round; love is what makes the ride worthwhile.
Love has no age, no limit; and no death.
Love is a serious mental disease.
Love is never lost. If not reciprocated, it will flow back and soften and purify the heart.
Love is the master key that opens the gates of happiness.
Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
Miracles come in moments. Be ready and willing.
Music in the soul can be heard by the universe.
No party has a monopoly on wisdom. No democracy works without compromise.
No snowflake in an avalanche ever feels responsible.
Only two things are infinite, the universe and human stupidity, and I'm not sure about the former.
Our intention creates our reality.
Pitching is the art of instilling fear.
Quality is not an act; it is a habit.
Reality is merely an illusion, albeit a very persistent one.
Science is organized knowledge. Wisdom is organized life.
Simply put, you believer that things or people make you unhappy, but this is not accurate. You make yourself unhappy.
Success consists of going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
Success is not final; failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Tell me and I forget. Teach me and I remember. Involve me and I learn.
Tennis is a perfect combination of violent action taking place in an atmosphere of total tranquillity.
The best thing about the future is that it only comes one day at a time.
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
The key to growth is the introduction of higher dimensions of consciousness into our awareness.
The only time to buy these is on a day with no 'y' in it.
The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
The pessimist sees difficulty in every opportunity. The optimist sees the opportunity in every difficulty.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
There are three faithful friends - an old wife, an old dog, and ready money.
There is only one happiness in life, to love and be loved.
Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
To bring anything into your life, imagine that it's already there.
To fly as fast as thought, you must begin by knowing that you have already arrived.
True knowledge exists in knowing that you know nothing.
True wisdom comes to each of us when we realize how little we understand about life, ourselves, and the world around us.
Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things that you didn't do than by the ones you did do.
We are Divine enough to ask and we are important enough to receive.
We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
We do not quit playing because we grow old, we grow old because we quit playing.
We make a living by what we get, but we make a life by what we give.
We must become the change we want to see.
What lies behind us and what lies before us are small matters compared to what lies within us.
What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
What other people may find in poetry or art museums, I find in the flight of a good drive.
When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
When your desires are strong enough you will appear to possess superhuman powers to achieve.
Where there is great love, there are always miracles.
Whoso loves, believes the impossible.
Work like you don't need the money. Love like you've never been hurt. Dance like nobody's watching.
You are important enough to ask and you are blessed enough to receive back.
You have to believe in yourself.
You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
You'll see it when you believe it.
